title: Sunrise [BG]
body:
This Texturepack is a Scool Project. Credits are in the Pack
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0dfe85aa51d79eaf68630ae4ca2d82bcbe3c6f.png)

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>
Optifine is needed for some Connected Textures.
You can still use it but the Texturepack has some 3D models which you need Oprifine for.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Unusal Sword Texture
- Better Tools
- Gold and Iron --> Sun and Moon
- Better HUD and GUI
- Armor is in the Netherite Style
- The Minecarft Logo is now the Sunrise Logo.
- Simple Wool
- Low Fire
- Lots of new Blocks
- gray End Stone (A normal one is included in the files)
- Simplistic Stone and Grass.

</details>


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gG03nlJTwPA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
